name: daxoom
description: Authoritative business data API built for AI agents. Verified profiles authored by business owners, every response carries provenance (verification level, completeness score, freshness, upstream sources). 12 tools for search/profile/hours/offerings/AI-context plus a feedback loop (report incorrect data, submit consumer-facing reviews) and schema explainability (list/describe fields).
tagline: What schema.org is to web crawlers, Daxoom is to AI agents.

http.description: Remote Streamable HTTP transport. Requires an API key from https://daxoom.com/developer (free Developer tier: 3,000 queries/month). Same key gates the REST /pubapi/* endpoints.

tools.name: search_businesses
tools.description: Paginated business search by name, category, city, or geo radius.

tools.name: get_business
tools.description: Full business profile with provenance metadata.

tools.name: get_business_hours
tools.description: Operating hours by day of week.

tools.name: get_business_answers
tools.description: Pre-written Q&A authored by the business owner.

tools.name: get_business_ai_context
tools.description: Verified facts, canonical corrections, tone preferences, query hints — the LLM grounding payload.

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: Business taxonomy with schema.org type mapping.

tools.name: report_incorrect_data
tools.description: Flag stale or wrong fields for human triage. No auto-changes.

tools.name: submit_review
tools.description: Submit a consumer star rating + optional text (5 trust guards: key age, prior queries, lifetime cap, monthly cap).

tools.name: list_fields
tools.description: Enumerate every field available on a business profile (core + attributes + Q&A).

tools.name: describe_field
tools.description: Explain a single field — meaning, type, allowed values, source of truth.

resources.description: Full field catalog (core + attributes + questions, merged).
Platform-wide totals by verification level + top categories.

meta_fields: provenance (single-business tools): verification_level (O/E/S/C), completeness_score (0.00–1.00), updated_at, verified_at, sources[]
pagination (list tools): limit, offset, total, has_more, next_offset

differentiators: Owner-authored verified data with trust-guarded, agent-verified reviews
AI-native fields: canonical_facts, query_hints, tone_style, disambiguation
Public business data is public; owner-entered data stays the owner's (contributed for AI-agent use); Daxoom-generated data is proprietary — all served under the Daxoom API Terms
Cross-platform — one profile feeds ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, indie agents
Citation-friendly — every payload has a stable daxoom URL the agent can surface as source
